audit_status.source_base: Greek 1 John text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for advocate, commandment, love/hate sibling, world-desire, antichrist language, anointing, remaining.

verses.restored: My little children, I write these things to you so that you may not sin/misalign. And if anyone does sin/misalign, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Messiah righteous/just.
And he is atoning mercy concerning our sins/misalignments, and not concerning ours only but also concerning whole world.
And by this we know that we have known him: if we keep his commands.
The one saying, I have known him, and not keeping his commands, is a liar, and truth is not in this one.
But whoever keeps his word, truly in this one the love of the Divine has been completed. By this we know that we are in him.
The one saying to remain in him ought also to walk just as that one walked.
Beloved, I write not a new command to you but an old command that you had from beginning; the old command is the word that you heard.
Again I write a new command to you, which is true in him and in you, because darkness is passing away and the true light already shines.
The one saying to be in the light and hating one's sibling is in darkness until now.
The one loving one's sibling remains in the light, and there is no stumbling in that one.
But the one hating one's sibling is in darkness and walks in darkness and does not know where one goes, because darkness blinded one's eyes.
I write to you, little children, because the sins/misalignments have been released/forgiven you through his name.
I write to you, fathers, because you have known the One from beginning. I write to you, young ones, because you have overcome the harmful one.

I wrote to you, children, because you have known the Father. I wrote to you, fathers, because you have known the One from beginning. I wrote to you, young ones, because you are strong, and the word of the Divine remains in you, and you have overcome the harmful one.
Do not love the world-system nor the things in the world-system. If anyone loves the world-system, the love of the Father is not in that one.
Because everything in the world-system—the desire of the flesh, the desire of the eyes, and the boastfulness of life— is not from the Father but from the world-system.
And the world-system is passing away, and its desire; but the one doing the will of the Divine remains into the age.
Little children, it is last hour; and just as you heard that antichrist/opposing-Messiah comes, even now many opposing-Messiah figures have come; from this we know that it is last hour.
They went out from us, but they were not of us; for if they had been of us, they would have remained with us; but it happened so that they might be manifest, that they all are not of us.
And you have an anointing from the Holy One, and you all know.
I did not write to you because you do not know the truth, but because you know it, and because every lie is not from truth.
Who is the liar except the one denying that Jesus is the Messiah? This is the antichrist/opposing-Messiah, the one denying the Father and the Son.
Everyone denying the Son does not have the Father either; the one confessing the Son has the Father also.
As for you, what you heard from beginning, let it remain in you. If what you heard from beginning remains in you, you also will remain in the Son and in the Father.
And this is the promise that he promised us: age-long life.
These things I wrote to you concerning those leading you astray.

And as for you, the anointing that you received from him remains in you, and you have no need that anyone teach you; but as his anointing teaches you concerning all things, and is true and is not lie, and just as it taught you, remain in him.
And now, little children, remain in him, so that if he is manifested we may have boldness and not be shamed from him at his presence/arrival.
If you know that he is righteous/just, you know that everyone doing righteousness/justice has been born from him.

translation_notes: Antichrist language is rendered opposing-Messiah and must not be used as paranoia or target-mapping.
World-system is used for kosmos where it means disordered desire-system, not creation itself.
Remaining/abiding is central: meno as relational continuity in Father/Son/truth/anointing.
